subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-25 in Sacramento
subcodes.first_line: Sacramento is a good city. It is a well-built city. You must strive to make it a center of radiance and mercy. America is a marvellous country
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @man's distinction from the animal, @human reality created in the image of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
